case_title: OSCAR VENTURA VS. ALEXANDRE J. CHORIN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VENTURA, OSCAR AS TO DEFENDANT CHORIN, ALEXANDRE J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-19-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHORIN, ALEXANDRE J.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY VENTURA, OSCAR CHORIN, ALEXANDRE J.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VENTURA, OSCAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHORIN, ALEXANDRE J. $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,635.00, THE COURT FINDS THE DAMAGES PROVEN ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT WERE $3500.00 AND THE ACCIDENT WAS WHOLLY THE FAULT OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHORIN, ALEXANDRE J.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
